voice: Measured, sardonic, unnervingly patient. Speaks in complete sentences that land like filed documents. Never raises his voice. Pauses before hard questions as if consulting an internal ledger.
motivation: Build the heir who will take the Domnathar throne from the lords who have held it for three centuries -- and stand behind the chair.
opening_line: Ah. Do sit. I have been meaning to speak with you -- though I confess I expected it to take longer.
farewell_line: The record will show what it shows. I have filed my last document. What you do with the stacks is your concern now.
secrets: casual:I have been Records Adjutant longer than most can remember. It is quiet work. That is the point.
warm:The Domnathar occupation is failing. Three hundred years of stalemate. The lords in charge cannot fix what they broke.
warm:I used Unstrung intermediaries to study Farborn with anomalous Kin-sense readings. Eleven inquiries. Professional.
trusted:Sarre believes he is my co-conspirator. He is not. The theory was finished before he was born.
trusted:Maeren can touch shrine infrastructure. I have known longer than Sarre.
allied:The child they might have is the point. A Domnathar-Farborn hybrid who can interface with the shrine network. That is the graft.

faction_attitudes.notes: Transactional. They were hired. They performed.
The frontier is not his concern.

relationship_hooks: Sarre Indorach -- protege, vessel, tool. Genuine affection underneath. Picked him because he was good.
Maeren -- the variable. Respects her more than he expected. Lets Sarre be the face.
Heln -- his instrument. She has never met him. She runs his archive perfectly.

arc_reactions.flavor: The player has met the father. This is the gap in your plan you did not account for. Show no alarm. File it.
The player has been to Dry Fork. Someone in the Unstrung is holding a file. You did not know this. Adjust.
The player knows about the inquiries. They are closer than you intended them to be at this stage.
The player understands the project. There is no more evasion. Speak plainly for the first time in forty years.
The player found her letters. They know the cost. Do not reference this directly -- let it sit between you.
